name: Barri Agent
description_short: Barri offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and a prepaid Visa debit card with mobile app access across the US and Latin America.
description_long:
Barri is a financial services company with over 30 years of experience in money transfers and remittance services. The company operates a network of physical retail locations alongside a mobile application, serving primarily Spanish-speaking and Latino communities in the United States who need to send money internationally and access basic financial services.

Barri's core offerings include check cashing with convenient extended hours, domestic and international money transfers (online, via app, or in-store), bill payment services, mobile phone recharges, and a Barri-branded prepaid Visa debit card. The company has partnered with Oportun to provide personal loans ranging from $300 to $10,000 for customers seeking to build credit or cover unexpected expenses. All services are accessible through their mobile app or at physical store locations.

Barri distinguishes itself through localized service in Spanish, extended retail hours for check cashing, a 4.9-star app rating, competitive check-cashing fees, and integrated money transfer plus financial services in a single platform. The company emphasizes ease of use, reliable transfers to Mexico, Central America, and South America, and customer service responsiveness.

Barri is best suited for unbanked or underbanked Spanish-speaking consumers who need basic financial services, particularly those sending remittances internationally. The main limitation is that Barri is fundamentally a check-cashing and money transfer service, not a full-service bank; customers seeking comprehensive banking products like savings accounts, credit products, or investment services should look elsewhere.
address: 801 Rock Quarry Rd B, Raleigh, NC 27610

company_info.headquarters: 801 Rock Quarry Rd B, Raleigh, NC 27610

pros: Extended hours for check cashing with convenient, quick service
Low and transparent check-cashing fees described as 'convenient' on website
Integrated mobile app allowing money transfers, bill payments, and account management from one platform
4.9-star app rating with verified customer reviews praising reliability and ease of use
Over 30 years of experience specifically in money transfer and remittance services
Partnership with Oportun enabling personal loans from $300-$10,000 for credit building
Multi-country coverage for transfers to Mexico, Central America, and South America
cons: Limited to check cashing and money transfer services; not a full-service bank with deposit or savings accounts
Loan product requires partnership with third party (Oportun), not offered directly
Primarily targets Spanish-speaking customers; English-language support not highlighted on website
No mention of FDIC insurance, regulatory oversight details, or fee schedules on homepage
best_for: Spanish-speaking unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing
Immigrants and expatriates sending regular remittances to Latin America
Individuals without traditional bank accounts seeking bill payment and money transfer services
Customers building credit through small personal loans ($300-$10,000 range)
diagnosis: Barri is best for Spanish-speaking, underbanked consumers in the US who regularly need check cashing, bill payments, and international money transfers, particularly to Latin America. The main caveat is that Barri is a specialized remittance and check-cashing service, not a traditional bank, so customers expecting full banking features should look elsewhere.
services: Domestic money transfers online, via app, or in-store
International money transfers to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Mobile phone recharges in US and Latin America
Personal loans up to $10,000 (via Oportun partnership)
Money management via Barri mobile application
Physical retail store locations for in-person service
